conflictBlocks.oursContent: import React, { useCallback, useMemo, useState } from "react";

<CreateTicketModal
        show={ticketOpen}
        error={ticketError}
        createDraft={ticketDraft}
        customers={customer ? [customer] : []}
        priorityOptions={ticketPriorityOptions}
        isCreating={createTicketMutation.isPending}
        onClose={closeTicket}
        onDraftChange={setTicketDraft}
        onCreate={onCreateTicket}
      />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
<CreateTicketModal
        show={ticketOpen}
        error={ticketError}
        createDraft={ticketDraft}
        customers={customer ? [customer] : []}
        priorityOptions={ticketPriorityOptions}
        isCreating={createTicketMutation.isPending}
        onClose={() => openTicket(false)}
        onDraftChange={setTicketDraft}
        onCreate={onCreateTicket}
      />

preservedBehaviors: CustomerHeader accepts both onNewTicket and setTicketOpen props
CustomerHeader renders New ticket button with LifeBuoy icon
All CRM pages import CreateTicketModal and have DEFAULT_TICKET_DRAFT
All CRM pages createTicketMutation posts to /api/helpdesk/tickets
Ticket creation validates subject and formats with area tag prefix
Ticket creation detects field work tags for autoCreateJobCard
Tasks page has status filter and due filter and mineOnly toggle
Deals page has pipeline and list view toggle
Dashboard page has pipeline BarChart and wins LineChart
Dashboard page shows overdue and open tasks cards
CustomerHeader prefers onNewTicket callback over setTicketOpen (ours)
Customer detail page passes onNewTicket to CustomerHeader (ours)
Tasks and deals pages import LifeBuoy from lucide-react (theirs)
Tasks and deals pages have New ticket button with LifeBuoy (theirs)
Dashboard page imports LifeBuoy and has New ticket button (theirs)
